description: Web screenshot and HTML render MCP server for AI agents. The hosted Streamable HTTP endpoint captures web pages, renders HTML/CSS to images, and supports selector, viewport, and full-page screenshot options.

commands: claude mcp add --transport streamable-http shotapi https://aiphotoshop.mynatapp.cc/mcp

notes: Hosted free tier is available without signup; paid usage can use SHOTAPI_KEY in local stdio mode.
Initialized the hosted Streamable HTTP endpoint during review.
